source_jobs.title: Enterprise Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
Aquant is the Agentic AI platform purpose-built for service organizations that maintain complex equipment. Unlike generic AI tools, Aquant combines domain expertise with intelligent agents that capture and apply institutional knowledge across service teams. By analyzing service data, from manuals to technician notes,Aquant imp roves troubleshooting, accelerates training, reduces costs, and transforms service into a revenue driver. Learn more at www.aquant.ai

*********************************************

We’re looking for an Enterprise Business Development Representative who will be responsible for building a sales pipeline through strategic planning, outbound prospecting, and inbound lead qualification. This is a great opportunity to get in on the ground floor of an innovative AI technology company, make an impact, and develop enterprise-level sales skills through ongoing mentoring and coaching alongside our team of Enterprise Account Executives.

In this role you'll learn how to build relationships with prospective customers and earn their trust while emphasizing customer value over product features. You'll gain an understanding of how to use research techniques to personalize prospect outreach and overcome objections to move prospects forward in the sales cycle. And you’ll have access to best-in-class technology to assist in your day-to-day work and ongoing training programs to enhance your skills.

Responsibilities:

 - Engage with prospects through outbound calling, social media, and email

 - Set meetings with qualified prospects for paired Account Executive

 - Research target accounts and contacts to understand buying motives and pain points

 - Work with Marketing to leverage content, cultivate, and convert leads

 - Embrace and communicate Aquant’s value propositions to various market segments and personas

 - Partner with Sales to create and implement strategic and tactical account outreach 

 - Leverage Salesforce, Gong, LinkedIn Navigator, Seamless.ai, and ZoomInfo and analytical tools to manage and track activity

 - Follow up promptly with inbound leads

 - Keep on top of current industry and competitive trends

The Ideal Candidate:

 - 1+ years experience in business development or sales role at a B2B company preferred

 - Persistent self-starter with a resilient attitude and “hunter” mentality

 - Sense of urgency and ability to manage time and prioritize tasks

 - Strong attention to detail and exceptional organizational skills

 - Excellent interpersonal, presentation, and written communication skills

 - Ability to work independently and collaborate with a team

 - Culturally sensitive and ethical

 - Coachable and hungry to learn  

 - Comfortable interacting with senior executives

 - Committed to continuous professional development, particularly in embracing emerging technologies, including conversational AI platforms such as ChatGPT

It's not enough to have a cool product; join us because you share our values:

These guiding values inspire every Aquant employee. They are how we operate and enable our company as a whole to have a greater impact and achieve our vision:

 - Be Humble and Respectful: We are one team, where collective success is more important than individual ego. Treat your colleagues with respect and empathy, act with good intent and value everyone’s contributions.   

 - Be Curious: Keep learning and asking questions to understand complex situations. Embrace new challenges. Keep an open mind, and be receptive to feedback.  

 - Take Ownership: Focus on achieving measurable and meaningful outcomes. Take decisive action, solve problems proactively, and take ownership for projects and results. 

 - Act with Integrity: Act with Integrity. Do great things while doing the right thing for your customers and colleagues.

Some of our benefits: 

 - We’ve got you covered: From medical, dental, vision, life, and 401k match & retirement, we’re here to support your physical, mental, and financial wel

source_jobs.title: Sales Engineer (Enterprise AI / Service Intelligence)
source_jobs.description:
At Aquant, we’re transforming how service organizations leverage AI to drive smarter decisions and better outcomes. As a Sales Engineer, you won’t just support deals, you’ll shape how customers understand and adopt AI at an enterprise level.

We are looking for an experienced Sales Engineer to partner closely with our sales team in driving enterprise deals for Aquant.ai http://Aquant.ai. This is a highly strategic, customer-facing role where you will translate complex technical capabilities into clear business value, while confidently engaging with senior technical stakeholders, including CIOs, CTOs, and heads of service operations.

You will act as the technical backbone of the sales process: leading discovery, demonstrating our AI-driven service intelligence platform, and addressing deep architectural and integration questions with credibility.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Collaborate with Account Executives to drive technical strategy and solution design across the full sales cycle

 - Lead technical discovery sessions to uncover customer requirements, data environments, and constraints

 - Design and position solutions that align Aquant’s capabilities with customer business and technical goals

 - Lead high-stakes technical engagements, delivering demos and presentations that secure executive buy-in

 - Translate AI/ML concepts, data pipelines, and platform architecture into clear, business-relevant messaging for both technical and executive audiences

 - Build credibility with CIOs and senior stakeholders by confidently addressing complex technical questions

 - Articulate system architecture, data flows, security, deployment models, and integration approaches (APIs, CRM, FSM, ERP systems)

 - Drive technical validation through POCs, pilots, and evaluations, ensuring customers understand implementation considerations and expected outcomes

 - Identify and mitigate technical risks throughout the sales process

 - Partner with product and engineering teams to address advanced requirements and edge cases

 - Provide structured feedback from the field to inform product development and refine messaging and positioning




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR- EXPERIENCE

 - 5+ years in a Sales Engineer / Solutions Engineer / Pre-Sales role

 - Experience selling complex AI or SaaS/analytics platforms to enterprise customers

 - Proven ability to engage with senior technical stakeholders (CIO, CTO, enterprise architects)

 - Strong understanding of modern data architectures (data lakes, pipelines, ETL, APIs)

 - Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and the ability to explain them without jargon

 - Experience with enterprise systems such as Salesforce, ServiceNow, or other FSM/ERP platforms

 - Knowledge of cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and enterprise security considerations

 - Exceptional ability to translate technical detail into business value

 - Confident presenting to both technical and non-technical audiences

 - Comfortable handling objections and thinking on your feet in high-stakes conversations

 - Customer-first and solutions-oriented

 - Collaborative and comfortable working cross-functionally

 - Curious, adaptable, and excited about AI-driven products

 - Hands-on experience using AI tools to build custom demonstrations
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in service operations, field service management, or industrial/service organizations

 - Background in data science, analytics, or AI-driven applications

 - Experience with POCs, pilots, or enterprise implementation discussions
   

It's not enough to have a cool product, join us because you share our values:

These guiding values inspire every Aquant employee. They are how we operate and enable our company as a whole to have a greater impact and achieve our vision:

 - Be Humble and Respectful: We are one team, where collective success is more important than individual ego. Treat your colleagues with respect and empathy, act with good intent and value everyone’s contributions.

source_jobs.title: Senior Enterprise Account Executive -MA
source_jobs.description:
Aquant is the Agentic AI platform purpose-built for service organizations that maintain complex equipment. Unlike generic AI tools, Aquant combines domain expertise with intelligent agents that capture and apply institutional knowledge across service teams. By analyzing service data, from manuals to technician notes, Aquant improves troubleshooting, accelerates training, reduces costs, and transforms service into a revenue driver. Learn more at www.aquant.ai



We are looking for a dynamic and ambitious Senior Sales Executive with a track record of proven success, with 5+ years of software sales in a SaaS company, to join our ambitious team. As a Senior Enterprise Account Executive at Aquant, you are a hunter, you are a creative, energetic, self-starter who understands the sales process. You know how to sell innovation and disruption through customer vision expansion and can drive deals forward to compress decision cycles. You love understanding a product in-depth and are passionate about communicating its value to CIOs and COOs of Fortune 500 companies. Always hunting for new opportunities, you must be able to close net new accounts while maintaining existing accounts.

 

Job Requirements and Responsibilities:

 - Lead the full deal lifecycle, enablement deliverables, required resources, technology support, maturity model, sales methodology etc.

 - Establish a deep understanding of customers’ business needs by creating value to customers for our solution footprint.

 - Demonstrate to customers how they benefit by partnering with Aquant and how our solutions deliver results.

 - Relentlessly develop and drive a sustainable commercial and solution strategy across multiple customer divisions and geographic poles that is aligned to the agreed account goals.

 - Develop and execute an Account Playbook that formalizes the “go high / go low” strategy for the Enterprise account.

 - Analyzes sales pipeline and maintains an array of opportunities to ensure that sales goals are achieved.

 - Actively grow and maintain a multi-year account plan that will be shared globally with parts of our business including Marketing, Product Management, Sales, Customer Success, and the Development teams to ensure coordination across the business.

 

What you bring to the table:

 - 5+ years of Enterprise software and solution selling experience in a startup environment.

 - Desire to work in a startup sales organization.

 - A consistent track record of goal attainment and over achievement in your geography.

 - Dynamic, self-motivated, creative thinker with an appreciation of corporate goals.

 - An exceptional communicator - articulate, confident, self-aware and personable.

 - Able to build strong working relationships and execute across multiple cultures, geographies and time zones

 - Passion for technology and service. Ability to quickly learn new software.

 - Open to hybrid work in Boston, MA or New York City, NY.

It's not enough to have a cool product, join us because you share our values:

These guiding values inspire every Aquant employee. They are how we operate and enable our company as a whole to have a greater impact and achieve our vision:

 - Be Humble and Respectful: We are one team, where collective success is more important than individual ego. Treat your colleagues with respect and empathy, act with good intent and value everyone’s contributions.   

 - Be Curious: Keep learning, and asking questions to understand complex situations. Embrace new challenges. Keep an open mind, and be receptive to feedback.  

 - Take Ownership: Focus on achieving measurable and meaningful outcomes. Take decisive action, solve problems proactively, and take ownership for projects and results. 

 - Act with Integrity: Act with Integrity. Do great things while doing the right thing for your customers and colleagues.

 

Some of our benefits:

 - We’ve got you covered: From medical, dental, vision, life, and 401k match & retirement, we’re here to
